[muhe_v31.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28822551/muhe_v31.html)
# Branding
muu
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0">
<title>MUHE</title>
<style>
@import url('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/orioncactus/pretendard/dist/web/static/pretendard.css');
@import url('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/fonts-archive/AppleSDGothicNeo/subsets/AppleSDGothicNeo-dynamic-subset.css');
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
:root{
  --blue:#3fbfef;--bd:#1a9fd4;--bp:#e8f7fd;
  --f:'Pretendard','Apple SD Gothic Neo',-apple-system,sans-serif;
}
html,body{width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;cursor:none;font-family:var(--f);}

/* 커서 */
#cur{position:fixed;z-index:9999;width:30px;height:30px;pointer-events:none;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);}
#cur svg{width:100%;height:100%;}

/* 배경화면 */
#desk{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1;background:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,') center/cover no-repeat;}

/* 위젯 */
#wgt{
  position:fixed;top:24px;left:24px;z-index:2;
  width:160px;
  background:transparent;border:none;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  cursor:pointer;overflow:visible;
  transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
}
#wgt:hover{transform:scale(1.08) translateY(-4px);}
#wgt:hover .wgt-hint{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.wi{width:140px;height:140px;object-fit:contain;animation:flt 4s ease-in-out infinite;filter:drop-shadow(0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.25));pointer-events:none;}
.wgt-hint{
  margin-top:6px;
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.18em;color:rgba(30,100,160,.7);
  font-weight:600;text-align:center;
  opacity:0;transform:translateY(-4px);
  transition:opacity .3s ease,transform .3s ease;
  pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.75);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
  padding:4px 10px;border-radius:10px;
  border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.3);
  animation:wgtPulse 2.5s ease-in-out 1.5s infinite;
}
@keyframes wgtPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(63,191,239,.35)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(63,191,239,0)}}
@keyframes flt{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-7px)}}

/* 팝업 오버레이 */
#pop{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
#pop.open{display:flex;}
#pdim{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,10,20,.3);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);}
#pbox{
  position:relative;z-index:1;
  width:min(1100px,90vw);height:min(680px,86vh);
  border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:0 40px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  background:rgba(220,242,252,.97);
}
#pclose{
  position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;z-index:50;
  width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(63,191,239,.15);border:none;cursor:none;
  color:#5599bb;font-size:13px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  transition:background .2s;
}
#pclose:hover{background:rgba(63,191,239,.3);}

/* 수치 박스 */
#pstats{
  flex:0 0 auto;padding:24px 44px 16px;
  text-align:center;position:relative;z-index:10;
}
.slbl{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:rgba(30,100,160,.5);font-weight:300;margin-bottom:12px;}
.sbox{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:32px;
  border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.28);border-radius:14px;
  padding:14px 40px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.55);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
}
.si{text-align:center;}
.sn{font-size:30px;font-weight:900;color:var(--bd);letter-spacing:-.02em;line-height:1;}
.su{font-size:10px;color:rgba(30,100,160,.55);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-top:2px;}
.sdv{width:1px;height:36px;background:rgba(63,191,239,.22);}

/* 분할 패널 */
#psplit{flex:1;display:flex;position:relative;min-height:0;}
.spl{
  flex:1;position:relative;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  gap:10px;padding:28px 32px;cursor:none;
  transition:flex .45s cubic-bezier(.25,.46,.45,.94);overflow:hidden;
}
.spl:hover{flex:1.1;}
#sg{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#b8e8f8,#8dd8f0,#72cfe8);}
#sh{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#cef0fa,#b0e6f7,#96dbf2);border-left:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5);}
.sfog{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 50% at 50% 100%,rgba(255,255,255,.28),transparent 60%);animation:fd 5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes fd{0%,100%{opacity:.8}50%{opacity:1}}
.slb{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.45em;color:rgba(30,100,160,.55);font-weight:300;}
.sis{width:150px;height:150px;object-fit:contain;animation:flt 4s ease-in-out infinite;filter:drop-shadow(0 8px 20px rgba(63,191,239,.25));}
.shb{width:88px;height:88px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.5);border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.28);border-radius:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;animation:flt 3.5s ease-in-out infinite .5s;}
.stt{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;text-align:center;line-height:1.35;}
.sds{font-size:11px;color:rgba(30,100,160,.6);text-align:center;line-height:1.8;font-weight:300;}
.sbtn{margin-top:6px;padding:10px 28px;border-radius:20px;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;font-size:13px;font-family:var(--f);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),box-shadow .3s;}
.sbtn:hover{transform:scale(1.06);}
.gbtn{background:var(--bd);color:white;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(26,159,212,.35);}
.hbtn{background:rgba(255,255,255,.9);color:#1a5a7a;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.12);}
.sdiv{position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;left:50%;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.4),transparent);pointer-events:none;z-index:5;}

/* 전체화면 뷰 */
#fv{position:absolute;inset:0;display:none;flex-direction:column;background:rgba(220,242,252,.97);z-index:20;}
#fv.on{display:flex;}
#ftgl{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;z-index:30;display:none;}
#ftgl.show{display:block;}
.tpill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:14px;cursor:none;border:none;background:rgba(63,191,239,.15);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.28);color:#1a5a7a;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--f);transition:background .2s,transform .2s;}
.tpill:hover{background:rgba(63,191,239,.28);transform:scale(1.04);}
#fc{flex:1;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}

/* 게임 전체화면 */
#fvg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#b8e8f8,#8dd8f0,#72cfe8);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:16px;}
#fvg.on{display:flex;}
.fgf{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% 100%,rgba(255,255,255,.22),transparent 60%);animation:fd 5s ease-in-out infinite;}
.fgl{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.45em;color:rgba(30,100,160,.55);position:relative;z-index:1;}
.fgt{font-size:26px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.fgd{font-size:12px;color:rgba(30,100,160,.6);text-align:center;line-height:1.8;position:relative;z-index:1;}

/* 홈 전체화면 */
#fvh{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,') center/cover no-repeat;
  display:none;overflow:hidden;
}
#fvh.on{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
#fhfog{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;pointer-events:none;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse 130% 55% at 50% 105%,rgba(200,230,248,.75) 0%,transparent 65%),
  linear-gradient(to top,rgba(200,230,248,.5) 0%,transparent 50%);}
#fhload{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:20;background:rgba(180,220,245,.95);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}
.fhlbar{width:180px;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;}
.fhlfill{height:100%;width:0;background:white;border-radius:2px;animation:lf 1.5s ease forwards;}
@keyframes lf{to{width:100%}}
.fhltxt{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.35em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.9);font-weight:300;}
#fhlogofog{
  display:none;
}
@keyframes fp{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) scale(1)}50%{transform:translateX(-50%) scale(1.04)}}
#fhlogofog.cleared{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-50%) scale(1.4) !important;pointer-events:none;}
#fogCanvas{
  position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  width:min(600px,90vw);height:220px;
  z-index:4;cursor:pointer;
  border-radius:50% 50% 40% 40%;
  pointer-events:all;
}
#fhla{position:absolute;top:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);text-align:center;z-index:5;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
#fhlogo{width:clamp(180px,28vw,360px);cursor:none;display:block;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 24px rgba(63,191,239,.45));}
#fhhint{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:rgba(30,100,160,.85);font-weight:500;text-shadow:0 1px 8px rgba(255,255,255,.85);}
#fhsub{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.45em;color:rgba(30,100,160,.7);font-weight:300;}
.ffy{position:absolute;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;cursor:pointer;z-index:5;transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),opacity .4s ease;animation:flt ease-in-out infinite;}
.fog-on .ffy{opacity:0;pointer-events:none;}
.fog-cleared .ffy{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto;}
.ffy:hover{transform:translateY(-10px) scale(1.08) !important;}
.ffy:hover .ffylbl{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.ffy:hover .ffybbl{transform:translateX(-50%) scale(1) translateY(0);opacity:1;}
#ff1{bottom:120px;left:8%;animation-duration:3.2s;}
#ff2{bottom:80px;left:36%;animation-duration:2.8s;animation-delay:.5s;}
#ff3{bottom:110px;right:7%;animation-duration:3.5s;animation-delay:1s;}
#ff2 .ffyimg{width:120px;height:144px;}
#ff3 .ffyimg{width:130px;height:156px;}
.ffyimg{width:88px;height:106px;object-fit:contain;filter:drop-shadow(0 6px 12px rgba(63,191,239,.2));transition:filter .3s;}
.ffy:hover .ffyimg{filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 22px rgba(63,191,239,.5)) brightness(1.05);}
.ffylbl{margin-top:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.88);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.25);border-radius:16px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--bd);font-weight:500;opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px);transition:opacity .3s,transform .3s;white-space:nowrap;}
.fog-cleared .ffylbl{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.ffybbl{position:absolute;bottom:calc(100% + 9px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) scale(0) translateY(8px);background:rgba(255,255,255,.95);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.28);border-radius:12px;padding:8px 13px;white-space:nowrap;font-size:10px;color:#1a5a7a;font-weight:500;pointer-events:none;z-index:20;transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),opacity .3s;opacity:0;box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(63,191,239,.1);}
.ffybbl::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:100%;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);border:5px solid transparent;border-top-color:rgba(255,255,255,.95);}
#fhgtgl{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;z-index:10;display:none;}
#fhgtgl.show{display:block;}
.spkl{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;background:white;animation:sk linear infinite;}
@keyframes sk{0%{transform:translateY(0) scale(0);opacity:0}25%{opacity:.9;transform:scale(1)}75%{opacity:.4}100%{transform:translateY(-80px) scale(.3);opacity:0}}

/* 외부 페이지들 */
.page{
  position:fixed;
  top:50%;left:50%;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  width:min(1100px,90vw);
  height:min(680px,86vh);
  border-radius:20px;
  overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:0 40px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
  z-index:150;
  opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
  transition:opacity .45s ease;
}
.page.active{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}
.page.active #bs,.page.active .mc,.page.active .bc,.page.active #ms{user-select:text;}
/* 페이지 활성 시 팝업 배경 dim 유지 */
#page-dim{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:140;
  background:rgba(0,10,20,.45);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
  display:none;
}
#page-dim.on{display:block;}
/* 페이지 공통 뒤로가기 버튼 */
.page-back{
  position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;z-index:60;
  width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.3);
  color:#1a5a7a;font-size:14px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(63,191,239,.15);
}
.page-back:hover{background:white;transform:scale(1.08);}
.game-pill{position:absolute;top:14px;left:54px;z-index:60;height:32px;padding:0 14px;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(63,191,239,.12);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.3);color:var(--bd);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.08em;font-family:var(--f);font-weight:500;cursor:none;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;}
.game-pill:hover{background:var(--blue);color:white;border-color:var(--blue);}
.home-pill-tr{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;z-index:60;height:32px;padding:0 14px;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border:1.5px solid rgba(91,200,232,.4);color:#5BC8E8;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.08em;font-family:var(--f);font-weight:500;cursor:none;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;}
.home-pill-tr:hover{background:rgba(91,200,232,.25);}
#fogt{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:160;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(200,230,248,.96),rgba(160,210,240,.99));opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .5s ease;}
#fogt.in{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}

/* 브랜드 */
#pb{background:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,') center/cover no-repeat;overflow:hidden;}
#pbfog{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(200,230,248,.55),rgba(230,245,252,.75) 40%,rgba(240,250,255,.88) 100%);}
.bh{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:10;padding:22px 40px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(200,230,248,.7),transparent);}
.hl{height:54px;cursor:pointer;filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(63,191,239,.3));transition:filter .25s;}
.hl:hover{filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 20px rgba(63,191,239,.7));}
.ht{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.35em;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;}
#bs{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:5;overflow-y:scroll;scrollbar-width:none;}
#bs::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
.bc{padding:96px 0 72px;}
.bsc{padding:0 56px;margin-bottom:64px;opacity:0;transform:translateY(50px);transition:opacity .85s,transform .85s;}
.bsc.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.sl{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.45em;color:rgba(63,191,239,.7);font-weight:400;margin-bottom:11px;}
.sh{position:relative;height:360px;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(63,191,239,.1),rgba(168,228,247,.2));border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.16);display:flex;align-items:flex-end;box-shadow:0 14px 44px rgba(63,191,239,.09);}
.shp{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;}
.shpt{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.25em;color:rgba(63,191,239,.38);}
.sib{position:relative;z-index:2;width:100%;padding:22px 28px;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(255,255,255,.93),transparent);}
.sn2{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:3px;}
.sa{font-size:11px;color:#5599bb;letter-spacing:.05em;margin-bottom:5px;}
.sbdy{font-size:11px;color:#7aabbc;line-height:1.85;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:9px;}
.stgs{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.stg{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.25);font-size:9px;color:var(--bd);background:rgba(255,255,255,.6);}
.sg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px;}
.sc{background:rgba(255,255,255,.75);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-radius:20px;padding:28px;border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.12);box-shadow:0 5px 24px rgba(63,191,239,.07);opacity:0;transform:translateY(34px);transition:opacity .7s,transform .7s,box-shadow .3s;}
.sc:nth-child(2){transition-delay:.15s;}
.sc.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.sc:hover{box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(63,191,239,.15);transform:translateY(-4px);}
.cn{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:rgba(63,191,239,.42);margin-bottom:12px;}
.ch{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:9px;line-height:1.4;}
.cb{font-size:11px;color:#5a8899;line-height:1.9;font-weight:300;}
.lm{text-align:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-radius:22px;padding:46px 40px;border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.12);box-shadow:0 5px 32px rgba(63,191,239,.08);}
.lb{font-size:58px;font-weight:900;color:var(--blue);letter-spacing:-.02em;line-height:1;text-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(63,191,239,.22);margin-bottom:6px;}
.lk{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:24px;}
.mr{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:40px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:22px;}
.mh{font-size:28px;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:5px;}
.mk{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:#5599bb;font-weight:400;}
.md{font-size:9px;color:#8bbdd4;margin-top:3px;}
.mdv{width:1px;background:rgba(63,191,239,.16);align-self:stretch;}
.ld{font-size:11px;color:#5a8899;line-height:2;font-weight:300;max-width:420px;margin:0 auto;}
.pt{display:flex;gap:12px;padding-bottom:4px;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none;}.pt::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
.vc{flex:0 0 215px;border-radius:18px;padding:26px 22px;border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.12);background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);box-shadow:0 3px 16px rgba(63,191,239,.06);cursor:none;opacity:0;transform:translateX(34px);transition:opacity .6s,transform .6s,box-shadow .3s;}
.vc.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}
.vc:nth-child(2).visible{transition-delay:.1s;}.vc:nth-child(3).visible{transition-delay:.2s;}.vc:nth-child(4).visible{transition-delay:.3s;}
.vc:hover{transform:translateY(-5px) scale(1.02);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(63,191,239,.16);}
.vt{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.3;}
.vd{font-size:10px;color:#5a8899;line-height:1.8;font-weight:300;}
.sw{background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);border-radius:22px;padding:40px;border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.12);box-shadow:0 5px 28px rgba(63,191,239,.08);}
.swt{font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.35;}
.sws{font-size:10px;color:#8bbdd4;letter-spacing:.12em;margin-bottom:24px;font-weight:300;}
.swg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:14px;}
.swi{background:rgba(63,191,239,.05);border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.1);border-radius:14px;padding:18px;text-align:center;opacity:0;transform:translateY(26px) scale(.96);transition:opacity .6s,transform .6s,box-shadow .3s;}
.swi.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1);}
.swi:nth-child(2).visible{transition-delay:.12s;}.swi:nth-child(3).visible{transition-delay:.24s;}
.swi:hover{box-shadow:0 7px 22px rgba(63,191,239,.12);transform:translateY(-3px);}
.swk{font-size:16px;font-weight:900;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:3px;}
.swu{font-size:8px;color:#8bbdd4;letter-spacing:.15em;margin-bottom:7px;}
.swl{font-size:10px;color:#5a8899;font-weight:300;line-height:1.6;}
.swc{margin-top:22px;text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#8bbdd4;letter-spacing:.1em;font-weight:300;line-height:2;}
.swc em{color:var(--blue);font-style:normal;font-weight:500;}
.prox{transition:opacity .35s ease;}.prox.dim{opacity:.18;}.prox.mid{opacity:.55;}.prox.near{opacity:1;text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(63,191,239,.2);}
.schi{position:absolute;bottom:20px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;z-index:10;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .5s;animation:sch 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes sch{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);opacity:.6}50%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(5px);opacity:1}}
.schl{width:1px;height:26px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,rgba(63,191,239,.6));}
.scht{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.25em;color:rgba(63,191,239,.6);}

/* 제품 */
#pp{background:#f0f9fe;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.ph{position:relative;z-index:10;padding:22px 40px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.ptl{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.35em;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;}
.fb{padding:14px 40px 0;display:flex;gap:7px;}
.ft{padding:5px 14px;border-radius:16px;border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.25);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;cursor:none;transition:all .25s;background:transparent;color:#5599bb;font-family:var(--f);}
.ft.active,.ft:hover{background:var(--blue);color:white;border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(63,191,239,.28);}
.bs2{padding:18px 40px 0;}
.sl2{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:14px;}

/* 베스트 캐러셀 */
.cw{overflow:hidden;cursor:none;}
.ct{display:flex;gap:20px;transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.25,.46,.45,.94);user-select:none;padding:4px 2px;}

/* 베스트 제품 카드 — 이미지만 보임, hover 시 팝업 */
.pc{
  flex:0 0 220px;height:260px;border-radius:20px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:white;
  box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(63,191,239,.1);cursor:none;
  transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),box-shadow .35s;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
}
.pc:hover{transform:translateY(-10px) scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 20px 48px rgba(63,191,239,.25);}
.pcb{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:72px;width:100%;height:100%;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bp) 0%,rgba(168,228,247,.3) 100%);
  transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1), font-size .4s;
}
.pc:hover .pcb{transform:scale(1.15);font-size:88px;}
.pe{background:rgba(200,230,248,.1);border:1.5px dashed rgba(63,191,239,.18);box-shadow:none;}
.pe .pcb{background:transparent;font-size:28px;color:rgba(63,191,239,.15);flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
.pe .pcb span{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:rgba(63,191,239,.22);}
.pe:hover{transform:none;box-shadow:none;}
.pe:hover .pcb{transform:none;font-size:28px;}

/* 구분선 */
.prod-divider{
  margin:28px 40px 0;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;
}
.prod-divider-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:rgba(63,191,239,.15);}
.prod-divider-label{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;white-space:nowrap;}

/* 일반 제품 그리드 */
.gs{padding:20px 40px 24px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1;}
.gg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:14px;}
.gc{
  aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:16px;background:white;cursor:none;
  box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(63,191,239,.07);
  transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),box-shadow .3s;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  flex-direction:column;gap:3px;font-size:36px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.gc:hover{transform:translateY(-6px) scale(1.06);box-shadow:0 14px 32px rgba(63,191,239,.2);}
.gc:hover .gc-icon{transform:scale(1.18);}
.gc-icon{font-size:36px;transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);}
.gce{background:rgba(200,230,248,.08);border:1.5px dashed rgba(63,191,239,.15);box-shadow:none;color:rgba(63,191,239,.12);}
.gce .gc-icon{font-size:22px;color:rgba(63,191,239,.2);}
.gce span{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.15em;color:rgba(63,191,239,.2);}
.gce:hover{transform:none;box-shadow:none;}
.gce:hover .gc-icon{transform:none;}

/* 제품 상세 팝업 */
#prod-popup{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:300;
  display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
}
#prod-popup.open{display:flex;}
#prod-dim{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,20,50,.45);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);}
#prod-box{
  position:relative;z-index:1;
  width:480px;max-height:80vh;
  background:white;border-radius:24px;
  overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.18);
  animation:pi .35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
}
.pb-img{
  height:220px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bp),rgba(168,228,247,.3));
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:88px;flex-shrink:0;
}
.pb-body{padding:28px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1;scrollbar-width:thin;}
.pb-body::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;}
.pb-body::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent;}
.pb-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(63,191,239,.3);border-radius:2px;}
.pb-tag{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--blue);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:8px;}
.pb-name{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:4px;}
.pb-price{font-size:16px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:16px;}
.pb-desc{font-size:13px;color:#5a8899;line-height:1.9;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:20px;}
.pb-features{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:24px;}
.pb-feat{padding:4px 12px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--bp);font-size:10px;color:var(--bd);font-weight:500;}
.pb-actions{display:flex;gap:10px;}
.pb-cart{flex:1;padding:12px;background:var(--blue);color:white;border:none;border-radius:12px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--f);cursor:none;transition:background .2s;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(63,191,239,.3);}
.pb-cart:hover{background:var(--bd);}
.pb-inquiry{padding:12px 20px;background:transparent;color:#8bbdd4;border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.25);border-radius:12px;font-size:13px;font-family:var(--f);cursor:none;transition:all .2s;}
.pb-inquiry:hover{background:rgba(63,191,239,.08);color:var(--bd);}
.pb-close{
  position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;z-index:10;
  width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.9);border:none;cursor:none;
  font-size:13px;color:#8bbdd4;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  transition:background .2s;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
}
.pb-close:hover{background:white;color:#1a5a7a;}

/* 장바구니 버튼 — 제품 일러스트 쌓이는 효과 */
#cb{
  position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;z-index:60;
  width:56px;height:56px;background:var(--blue);border-radius:50%;
  display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:none;
  box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(63,191,239,.4);
  transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
  overflow:visible;
}
#cb.visible{display:flex;}
#cb:hover{transform:scale(1.12);}
#cb svg{width:22px;height:22px;}
#cbc{
  position:absolute;top:-5px;right:-5px;
  width:20px;height:20px;background:#ff6b6b;border-radius:50%;
  font-size:9px;color:white;display:none;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;
  border:2px solid white;
}

/* 장바구니 hover 팝업 */
#cart-hover{
  position:fixed;bottom:90px;right:20px;z-index:59;
  width:280px;background:white;border-radius:18px;
  padding:20px;
  box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.14);
  display:none;
  animation:pi .25s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
}
#cart-hover.show{display:block;}
.ch-title{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:14px;}
.ch-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bp);}
.ch-icon{font-size:22px;}
.ch-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:#1a5a7a;}
.ch-price{font-size:11px;color:var(--blue);margin-top:1px;}
.ch-empty{font-size:11px;color:#aaccdd;text-align:center;padding:16px 0;}
.ch-total{margin-top:12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.ch-total-label{font-size:11px;color:#8bbdd4;}
.ch-total-price{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;}
.ch-checkout{margin-top:10px;width:100%;padding:10px;background:var(--blue);color:white;border:none;border-radius:10px;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--f);font-weight:600;cursor:none;}

/* 결제 팝업 */
#checkout-popup{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:400;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
#checkout-popup.open{display:flex;}
#checkout-dim{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,20,50,.5);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);}
#checkout-box{
  position:relative;z-index:1;width:480px;
  background:white;border-radius:20px;padding:36px;
  box-shadow:0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.18);
  animation:pi .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
  max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;
}
.co-title{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:24px;}
.co-section{margin-bottom:20px;}
.co-label{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:8px;}
.co-input{
  width:100%;padding:11px 14px;border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.2);
  border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;color:#1a5a7a;
  font-family:var(--f);outline:none;background:#f8fdff;
  transition:border-color .2s;
}
.co-input:focus{border-color:var(--blue);}
.co-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;}
.co-coupon{display:flex;gap:8px;}
.co-coupon .co-input{flex:1;}
.co-apply{padding:11px 16px;background:rgba(63,191,239,.1);color:var(--bd);border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.2);border-radius:10px;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--f);font-weight:600;cursor:none;white-space:nowrap;}
.co-summary{background:#f8fdff;border-radius:12px;padding:18px;margin-bottom:20px;}
.co-sum-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:#5a8899;margin-bottom:8px;}
.co-sum-total{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.15);}
.co-pay{width:100%;padding:14px;background:var(--blue);color:white;border:none;border-radius:12px;font-size:14px;font-family:var(--f);font-weight:700;cursor:none;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(63,191,239,.35);}
.co-close{position:absolute;top:16px;right:16px;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bp);border:none;cursor:none;font-size:13px;color:#5599bb;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
#cb{position:fixed;bottom:22px;right:22px;z-index:160;width:48px;height:48px;background:var(--blue);border-radius:50%;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:none;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(63,191,239,.38);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);}
#cb.visible{display:flex;}
#cb:hover{transform:scale(1.12);}
#cbc{position:absolute;top:-4px;right:-4px;width:17px;height:17px;background:#ff6b6b;border-radius:50%;font-size:8px;color:white;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;}
#cpop{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:200;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
#cpop.open{display:flex;}
#cdim{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,30,60,.36);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);}
#cbox{position:relative;z-index:1;width:340px;background:white;border-radius:20px;padding:26px;box-shadow:0 16px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.13);animation:pi .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);}
@keyframes pi{from{transform:scale(.85);opacity:0}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}
.cth{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;}
.cth h3{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;}
.cc{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bp);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:none;font-size:12px;color:#5599bb;}
.cem{text-align:center;padding:32px 0;font-size:11px;color:#aaccdd;letter-spacing:.1em;}
.ci{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:9px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bp);}
.cin{font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:#1a5a7a;}
.cip{font-size:10px;color:var(--blue);margin-top:2px;}
.cco{margin-top:16px;width:100%;padding:11px;background:var(--blue);color:white;border:none;border-radius:11px;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.1em;font-family:var(--f);font-weight:500;cursor:none;}

/* 마이페이지 */
#pm{background:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,') center/cover no-repeat;overflow:hidden;}
#pmf{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(200,230,248,.55),rgba(230,245,252,.75) 40%,rgba(240,250,255,.9) 100%);}
#ms{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:5;overflow-y:scroll;scrollbar-width:none;}
#ms::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
.mc{padding:96px 56px 64px;}
.lc{background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-radius:22px;padding:32px 40px;border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.12);box-shadow:0 5px 32px rgba(63,191,239,.08);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:22px;margin-bottom:22px;}
.la{width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bp),rgba(168,228,247,.5));border:2px solid rgba(63,191,239,.16);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;flex-shrink:0;}
.li{flex:1;}
.ln{font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:3px;}
.le{font-size:11px;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;}
.lb2{padding:8px 20px;border-radius:16px;background:var(--blue);color:white;border:none;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.1em;font-family:var(--f);font-weight:500;cursor:none;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(63,191,239,.25);transition:background .2s;}
.lb2.lo{background:transparent;color:#8bbdd4;border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.2);box-shadow:none;}
.mt{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:18px;}
.tb{padding:6px 18px;border-radius:16px;border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.2);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;color:#5599bb;font-family:var(--f);background:transparent;cursor:none;transition:all .25s;}
.tb.active,.tb:hover{background:var(--blue);color:white;border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(63,191,239,.25);}
.tc{display:none;}.tc.active{display:block;}
.cug{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(230px,1fr));gap:12px;}
.cuc{background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 24px;border:1.5px dashed rgba(63,191,239,.25);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),box-shadow .3s;}
.cuc:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 9px 24px rgba(63,191,239,.13);}
.cub{position:absolute;top:12px;right:12px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(63,191,239,.09);font-size:8px;color:var(--blue);letter-spacing:.1em;font-weight:500;}
.cud{font-size:22px;font-weight:900;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:3px;}
.cun{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:4px;}
.cude{font-size:9px;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;line-height:1.6;}
.cue{font-size:8px;color:#aaccdd;margin-top:7px;letter-spacing:.08em;}
.ol{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;}
.oc{background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 24px;border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.09);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),box-shadow .3s;cursor:none;}
.oc:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(63,191,239,.11);}
.ooh{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px;}
.oon{font-size:9px;color:#8bbdd4;letter-spacing:.15em;}
.oos{padding:2px 9px;border-radius:8px;font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.08em;}
.oos.del{background:rgba(63,191,239,.08);color:var(--bd);}.oos.pre{background:rgba(255,200,100,.13);color:#c8820a;}
.ooi{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:center;}
.oon2{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#1a5a7a;}.oop{font-size:10px;color:var(--blue);margin-top:2px;}.ood{font-size:9px;color:#aaccdd;margin-top:9px;}
.wg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(175px,1fr));gap:12px;}
.wc{background:rgba(255,255,255,.78);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.09);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),box-shadow .3s;cursor:none;position:relative;}
.wc:hover{transform:translateY(-4px) scale(1.02);box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(63,191,239,.16);}
.wi2{height:130px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bp),rgba(168,228,247,.25));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:36px;}
.wif{padding:13px;}.wn{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:3px;}.wp{font-size:11px;color:var(--blue);}
.wd{position:absolute;top:8px;right:8px;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:none;border:none;font-size:11px;color:#aaccdd;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s,background .2s,color .2s;}
.wc:hover .wd{opacity:1;}.wd:hover{background:#ff6b6b;color:white;}
/* 로그인 팝업 커스텀 커서 */
#lpop,#lpop *,.lpm,.lpm *{cursor:none !important;}

/* 로그인 팝업 오버레이 */
#lpop { position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.38);z-index:9999;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center; }
#lpop.open { display:flex; }
.lpm { background:white;border-radius:22px;padding:36px 32px;width:380px;max-width:90vw;position:relative; }
.lpm-close { position:absolute;top:14px;right:16px;background:none;border:none;font-size:18px;color:#aaa;cursor:none; }
.lpm-logo { text-align:center;color:var(--bd);font-size:22px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:4px; }
.lpm-sub { text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#aaa;margin-bottom:20px; }
.lpm-tabs { display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid #eee;margin-bottom:18px; }
.lpm-tab { flex:1;padding:9px;text-align:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:none;color:#aaa;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;margin-bottom:-1px;background:none;border-left:none;border-right:none;border-top:none;transition:all .2s;font-family:var(--f); }
.lpm-tab.active { color:var(--blue);border-bottom-color:var(--blue); }
.lpm-fields { display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px; }
.lpm-input { padding:11px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #e0e0e0;font-size:13px;outline:none;transition:border .2s;width:100%;font-family:var(--f); }
.lpm-input:focus { border-color:var(--blue); }
.lpm-hint { font-size:10px;color:#aaa;text-align:center; }
.lpm-err { font-size:11px;color:#e24b4a;text-align:center;display:none; }
.lpm-err.show { display:block; }
.lpm-submit { background:var(--blue);color:white;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;cursor:none;transition:background .2s;font-family:var(--f);width:100%; }
.lpm-submit:hover { background:var(--bd); }
.lpm-div { display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:12px 0 10px; }
.lpm-dl { flex:1;height:1px;background:#eee; }
.lpm-dt { font-size:11px;color:#ccc; }
.lpm-socials { display:flex;gap:8px; }
.lpm-social { flex:1;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #e0e0e0;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:none;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;transition:opacity .2s;font-family:var(--f); }
.lpm-social:hover { opacity:.8; }
.lpm-kakao { background:#FEE500;border-color:#FEE500;color:#3C1E1E; }
.lpm-naver { background:#03C75A;border-color:#03C75A;color:white; }

/* ══ 제품 페이지 ══ */
#pp { background:#f7fbfe; overflow:hidden; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
.ph { position:relative; z-index:10; padding:22px 40px 0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; }
.ptl { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:.35em; color:#8bbdd4; font-weight:300; }
.fb { padding:14px 40px 0; display:flex; gap:7px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.ft { padding:5px 14px; border-radius:16px; border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.25); font-size:10px; letter-spacing:.1em; cursor:none; transition:all .25s; background:transparent; color:#5599bb; font-family:var(--f); }
.ft.active,.ft:hover { background:var(--blue); color:white; border-color:var(--blue); }

/* 스크롤 컨테이너 */
#prod-scroll { flex:1; overflow-y:scroll; overflow-x:hidden; scrollbar-width:none; }
#prod-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { display:none; }

/* ── 베스트 갤러리 ── */
#best-section {
  position:relative;
  height:520px;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.12);
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.best-lbl {
  position:absolute; top:20px; left:40px; z-index:10;
  font-size:9px; letter-spacing:.4em; color:#8bbdd4; font-weight:300;
}
/* 갤러리 캔버스 */
#gcanvas {
  position:absolute; inset:0;
  width:1600px;
  transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.25,.46,.45,.94);
}

/* 갤러리 아이템 */
.gi {
  position:absolute;
  cursor:none;
  transition:z-index 0s;
}
.gi:hover { z-index:20; }

.gi-wrap {
  position:relative;
  border-radius:20px;
  overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(63,191,239,.1);
  transition:transform .45s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1), box-shadow .4s;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg, #e8f7fd 0%, rgba(168,228,247,.3) 100%);
}
.gi:hover .gi-wrap {
  transform:scale(1.05) translateY(-8px);
  box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(63,191,239,.28), 0 0 0 1px rgba(63,191,239,.18);
}

/* 가우시안 블러 빛 */
.gi-glow {
  position:absolute; inset:-40px; z-index:0; pointer-events:none;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(63,191,239,.22) 0%, transparent 65%);
  filter:blur(20px);
  opacity:0; transition:opacity .45s ease;
  border-radius:50%;
}
.gi:hover .gi-glow { opacity:1; }

/* 제품 표시 영역 */
.gi-art {
  width:100%; height:100%;
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  position:relative; overflow:hidden;
}

/* 기본 상태: 상품명 텍스트 */
.gi-label {
  font-size:13px; font-weight:600; color:#1a5a7a;
  letter-spacing:.05em; text-align:center;
  padding:16px;
  position:relative; z-index:2;
  transition:opacity .3s ease;
}
.gi:hover .gi-label { opacity:0; }

/* hover 시 슬라이드 재생 */
.gi-slides {
  position:absolute; inset:0;
  display:flex; flex-direction:column;
  opacity:0; transition:opacity .35s ease;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.gi:hover .gi-slides { opacity:1; }

.gi-slide {
  position:absolute; inset:0;
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  font-size:48px;
  opacity:0;
  animation:none;
}
.gi:hover .gi-slide:nth-child(1) { animation:slideA 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
.gi:hover .gi-slide:nth-child(2) { animation:slideA 3s ease-in-out 1s infinite; }
.gi:hover .gi-slide:nth-child(3) { animation:slideA 3s ease-in-out 2s infinite; }

@keyframes slideA {
  0%,25% { opacity:1; transform:scale(1.05); }
  33%,100% { opacity:0; transform:scale(1); }
}

.gi-slide-bg1 { background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(63,191,239,.15),rgba(168,228,247,.3)); }
.gi-slide-bg2 { background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(168,228,247,.2),rgba(63,191,239,.1)); }
.gi-slide-bg3 { background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(200,235,250,.3),rgba(63,191,239,.08)); }

/* hover CTA 버튼 */
.gi-cta {
  position:absolute; bottom:16px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(10px);
  padding:8px 22px; border-radius:18px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.92); backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  border:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.3);
  font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:#1a5a7a;
  font-family:var(--f); cursor:none; white-space:nowrap;
  opacity:0; transition:opacity .3s .1s ease, transform .3s .1s ease;
  z-index:10;
}
.gi:hover .gi-cta { opacity:1; transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }

/* 방울 */
.gi-bubbles { position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; z-index:5; overflow:visible; }
.bdot {
  position:absolute; border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(63,191,239,.4);
  opacity:0;
  transition:none;
}
.gi:hover .bdot { animation:brise ease-in-out infinite; }
@keyframes brise {
  0% { transform:translateY(0) scale(0); opacity:0; }
  20% { opacity:.8; transform:scale(1) translateY(-4px); }
  80% { opacity:.25; }
  100% { transform:translateY(-36px) scale(.3); opacity:0; }
}

/* ── ALL ITEMS 구분선 ── */
.prod-sep {
  padding:0 40px;
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px;
  margin:0;
}
.prod-sep-line { flex:1; height:1px; background:rgba(63,191,239,.14); }
.prod-sep-txt { font-size:9px; letter-spacing:.4em; color:#8bbdd4; font-weight:300; white-space:nowrap; }

/* ── ALL ITEMS 그리드 ── */
.all-grid {
  padding:32px 40px 48px;
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap:24px;
}
.agc {
  aspect-ratio:.9; border-radius:20px; background:white; cursor:none;
  box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(63,191,239,.09);
  transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1), box-shadow .35s;
  display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  gap:10px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; padding:16px;
}
.agc:hover { transform:translateY(-8px) scale(1.04); box-shadow:0 18px 40px rgba(63,191,239,.22); }
.agc-bg {
  position:absolute; inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bp) 0%, rgba(168,228,247,.2) 100%);
  opacity:0; transition:opacity .35s;
}
.agc:hover .agc-bg { opacity:1; }
.agc-icon { font-size:40px; transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1); position:relative; z-index:1; }
.agc:hover .agc-icon { transform:scale(1.22); }
.agc-name { font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:#1a5a7a; text-align:center; position:relative; z-index:1; letter-spacing:.03em; }
.agc-price { font-size:10px; color:var(--blue); position:relative; z-index:1; }
.agce { background:rgba(200,230,248,.07); border:1.5px dashed rgba(63,191,239,.15); box-shadow:none; }
.agce .agc-icon { font-size:22px; color:rgba(63,191,239,.18); }
.agce .agc-name { font-size:9px; color:rgba(63,191,239,.22); letter-spacing:.15em; }
.agce:hover { transform:none; box-shadow:none; }
.agce:hover .agc-bg { opacity:0; }
.agce:hover .agc-icon { transform:none; }

/* 장바구니 */
#cb { position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;z-index:160;width:52px;height:52px;background:var(--blue);border-radius:50%;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:none;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(63,191,239,.4);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1); }
#cb.visible { display:flex; }
#cb:hover { transform:scale(1.12); }
#cbc { position:absolute;top:-5px;right:-5px;width:20px;height:20px;background:#ff6b6b;border-radius:50%;font-size:9px;color:white;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;border:2px solid white; }
#cart-hover { position:fixed;bottom:86px;right:20px;z-index:59;width:270px;background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:18px;box-shadow:0 14px 44px rgba(0,0,0,.13);display:none; }
#cart-hover.show { display:block; }
.ch-title { font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:12px; }
.ch-item { display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bp); }
.ch-name { font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:#1a5a7a; }
.ch-price { font-size:10px;color:var(--blue);margin-top:1px; }
.ch-empty { font-size:10px;color:#aaccdd;text-align:center;padding:14px 0; }
.ch-total { margin-top:10px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center; }
.ch-total-label { font-size:10px;color:#8bbdd4; }
.ch-total-price { font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a; }
.ch-checkout { margin-top:9px;width:100%;padding:9px;background:var(--blue);color:white;border:none;border-radius:9px;font-size:11px;font-family:var(--f);font-weight:600;cursor:none; }

/* 제품 상세 팝업 */
#prod-popup { position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:300;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center; }
#prod-popup.open { display:flex; }
#prod-dim { position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,20,50,.45);backdrop-filter:blur(6px); }
#prod-box { position:relative;z-index:1;width:460px;max-height:80vh;background:white;border-radius:24px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.18);animation:pi .35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);display:flex;flex-direction:column; }
.pb-img { height:200px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bp),rgba(168,228,247,.3));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:72px;flex-shrink:0; }
.pb-body { padding:24px 28px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1; }
.pb-tag { font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--blue);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:7px; }
.pb-name { font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:4px; }
.pb-price { font-size:15px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:14px; }
.pb-desc { font-size:12px;color:#5a8899;line-height:1.9;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:18px; }
.pb-feats { display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;margin-bottom:22px; }
.pb-feat { padding:3px 11px;border-radius:11px;background:var(--bp);font-size:9px;color:var(--bd);font-weight:500; }
.pb-actions { display:flex;gap:8px; }
.pb-cart { flex:1;padding:11px;background:var(--blue);color:white;border:none;border-radius:11px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--f);cursor:none;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(63,191,239,.3); }
.pb-buy { flex:1;padding:11px;background:#1a5a7a;color:white;border:none;border-radius:11px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--f);cursor:none; }
.pb-inquiry { padding:11px 16px;background:transparent;color:#8bbdd4;border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.25);border-radius:11px;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--f);cursor:none; }
.pb-close { position:absolute;top:12px;right:12px;z-index:10;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.9);border:none;cursor:none;font-size:13px;color:#8bbdd4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.1); }

/* 결제 팝업 */
#checkout-popup { position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:400;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center; }
#checkout-popup.open { display:flex; }
#checkout-dim { position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,20,50,.5);backdrop-filter:blur(6px); }
#checkout-box { position:relative;z-index:1;width:460px;background:white;border-radius:20px;padding:32px;box-shadow:0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.18);max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto; }
.co-title { font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;margin-bottom:22px; }
.co-section { margin-bottom:18px; }
.co-label { font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:#8bbdd4;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:7px; }
.co-input { width:100%;padding:10px 13px;border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.2);border-radius:9px;font-size:12px;color:#1a5a7a;font-family:var(--f);outline:none;background:#f8fdff;margin-bottom:7px; }
.co-row { display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px; }
.co-coupon { display:flex;gap:7px; }
.co-coupon .co-input { flex:1;margin-bottom:0; }
.co-apply { padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(63,191,239,.1);color:var(--bd);border:1.5px solid rgba(63,191,239,.2);border-radius:9px;font-size:11px;font-family:var(--f);font-weight:600;cursor:none;white-space:nowrap; }
.co-summary { background:#f8fdff;border-radius:11px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:18px; }
.co-sum-row { display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:#5a8899;margin-bottom:7px; }
.co-sum-total { display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1a5a7a;padding-top:9px;border-top:1px solid rgba(63,191,239,.14); }
.co-pay { width:100%;padding:13px;background:var(--blue);color:white;border:none;border-radius:11px;font-size:13px;font-family:var(--f);font-weight:700;cursor:none;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(63,191,239,.35); }
.co-close { position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bp);border:none;cursor:none;font-size:12px;color:#5599bb;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center; }


@media (max-width:480px){
  #pbox{width:95vw;height:92vh;border-radius:14px;}
  #pstats{padding:16px 12px 10px;}
  .sbox{gap:14px;padding:10px 16px;}
  .sn{font-size:22px;}
  .su{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.05em;}
  .sdv{height:28px;}
  .sbtn{padding:8px 16px;font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;}
  .spl{padding:18px 14px;gap:6px;}
  .stt{font-size:16px;}
  .sds{font-size:9px;}
  .sis{width:100px;height:100px;}
  #wgt{top:12px;left:12px;}
  .wi{width:100px;height:100px;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="cur"><svg viewBox="0 0 30 30" fill="none"><circle cx="15" cy="15" r="11" fill="rgba(63,191,239,.12)" stroke="rgba(63,191,239,.75)" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="15" cy="15" r="3.2" fill="rgba(63,191,239,.85)"/></svg></div>
<div id="fogt"></div>
<div id="page-dim" onclick="goHome()"></div>

<!-- 배경화면 -->
<div id="desk"></div>

<!-- 위젯 -->
<div id="wgt" onclick="openPop()" title="클릭해서 시작하기">
  <img class="wi" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="섬">
</div>

<!-- 팝업 -->
<div id="pop">
  <div id="pdim" onclick="closePop()"></div>
  <div id="pbox">
    <button id="pclose" onclick="closePop()">✕</button>
    <div id="ftgl"></div>

    <!-- 수치 박스 -->
    <div id="pstats">
      <div class="slbl">✦ 무해와 함께 지킨 지구</div>
      <div class="sbox">
        <div class="si"><div class="sn" id="sw">0</div><div class="su">절약한 쓰레기 (t)</div></div>
        <div class="sdv"></div>
        <div class="si"><div class="sn" id="sr">0</div><div class="su">재활용률 (%)</div></div>
        <div class="sdv"></div>
        <div class="si"><div class="sn" id="su2">0</div><div class="su">함께하는 무해인</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 분할 -->
    <div id="psplit">
      <div class="sdiv"></div>
      <div class="spl" id="sg" onclick="selMode('game')">
        <div class="sfog"></div>
        <div class="slb">MUHE GAME</div>
        <img class="sis" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="섬">
        <div class="stt">안개섬<br>정화 게임</div>
        <div class="sds">섬을 정화하고 쿠폰을 모아<br>무해 쇼핑에서 사용하세요</div>
        <button class="sbtn gbtn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();openGame()">게임 시작</button>
      </div>
      <div class="spl" id="sh" onclick="selMode('home')">
        <div class="sfog"></div>
        <div class="slb">MUHE SHOP</div>
        <div class="shb"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:64px;height:auto;filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(63,191,239,.3));"></div>
        <div class="stt">무해<br>제로웨이스트샵</div>
        <div class="sds">제로웨이스트 제품을 탐색하고<br>지속 가능한 라이프를 시작하세요</div>
        <button class="sbtn hbtn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();selMode('home')">홈페이지로</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 전체화면 -->
    <div id="fv">
      <div id="ftgl2" style="position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;z-index:30;display:none;"></div>
      <div id="fc">
        <!-- 게임 -->
        <div id="fvg">
          <div class="fgf"></div>
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:160px;height:160px;object-fit:contain;animation:flt 4s ease-in-out infinite;filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 26px rgba(63,191,239,.28));position:relative;z-index:1;">
          <div class="fgl" style="position:relative;z-index:1;">✦ MUHE GAME</div>
          <div class="fgt" style="position:relative;z-index:1;">안개섬 정화 게임</div>
          <div class="fgd" style="position:relative;z-index:1;">게임에서 획득한 쿠폰은<br>무해 쇼핑에서 사용 가능합니다</div>
          <button class="sbtn gbtn" style="cursor:pointer;position:relative;z-index:1;" onclick="openGame()">게임 시작하기 →</button>
        </div>
        <!-- 홈페이지 -->
        <div id="fvh">
          <div id="fhfog"></div>
          <div id="fhload"><div class="fhltxt">안개가 걷히고 있습니다...</div><div class="fhlbar"><div class="fhlfill"></div></div></div>
          <div id="fhlogofog"></div>
          <canvas id="fogCanvas"></canvas>
          <div id="fhla">
            <img id="fhlogo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="MUHE">
            <div id="fhhint">안개를 클릭해보세요 ✦</div>
            <div id="fhsub">ZEROWASTE SHOP</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ffy" id="ff1" onclick="goPage('brand')">
            <div class="ffybbl">브랜드 이야기 들어볼래요?</div>
            <img class="ffyimg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
            <div class="ffylbl">Brand Story</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ffy" id="ff2" onclick="goPage('products')">
            <div class="ffybbl">좋은 제품들이 있어요!</div>
            <img class="ffyimg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
            <div class="ffylbl">Products</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ffy" id="ff3" onclick="goPage('mypage')">
            <div class="ffybbl">내 쿠폰 확인해요~</div>
            <img class="ffyimg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
            <div class="ffylbl">My Page</div>
          </div>
          <div id="fhgtgl" style="position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;z-index:10;display:none;">
            <button class="tpill" onclick="selMode('game')">
              <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><rect x="1" y="5" width="14" height="9" rx="3" stroke="#1a5a7a" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="3" y="8" width="3" height="1" rx=".5" fill="#1a5a7a"/><rect x="4" y="7" width="1" height="3" rx=".5" fill="#1a5a7a"/><circle cx="11" cy="8.5" r="1" fill="#1a5a7a"/><circle cx="13" cy="10.5" r="1" fill="#1a5a7a"/></svg>
              게임
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 장바구니 팝업 제거됨 (hover 방식으로 교체) -->


<!-- 제품 상세 팝업 -->
<div id="prod-popup">
  <div id="prod-dim" onclick="closeProd()"></div>
  <div id="prod-box">
    <button class="pb-close" onclick="closeProd()">✕</button>
    <div class="pb-img" id="pb-img">🧼</div>
    <div class="pb-body">
      <div class="pb-tag" id="pb-tag">BATH & CARE</div>
      <div class="pb-name" id="pb-name">고체 샴푸바</div>
      <div class="pb-price" id="pb-price">18,000원</div>
      <div class="pb-desc" id="pb-desc">
        종이 밴딩 패키지로 플라스틱 포장을 완전히 없앤 고체형 샴푸바입니다.
        천연 성분으로 두피와 모발을 부드럽게 케어하며, 일반 샴푸 대비 약 3배 오래 사용 가능합니다.
      </div>
      <div class="pb-features" id="pb-feats">
        <span class="pb-feat">플라스틱 제로</span>
        <span class="pb-feat">천연 성분</span>
        <span class="pb-feat">비건 인증</span>
        <span class="pb-feat">종이 밴딩</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pb-actions">
        <button class="pb-cart" onclick="addFromProd()">장바구니 담기</button>
        <button class="pb-inquiry">제품 문의</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 결제 팝업 -->
<div id="checkout-popup">
  <div id="checkout-dim" onclick="closeCheckout()"></div>
  <div id="checkout-box">
    <button class="co-close" onclick="closeCheckout()">✕</button>
    <div class="co-title">결제</div>
    <div class="co-section">
      <div class="co-label">받는 분</div>
      <input class="co-input" placeholder="이름" style="margin-bottom:8px;">
      <input class="co-input" placeholder="연락처">
    </div>
    <div class="co-section">
      <div class="co-label">배송지</div>
      <input class="co-input" placeholder="주소" style="margin-bottom:8px;">
      <input class="co-input" placeholder="상세 주소">
    </div>
    <div class="co-section">
      <div class="co-label">쿠폰</div>
      <div class="co-coupon">
        <input class="co-input" placeholder="쿠폰 코드 입력">
        <button class="co-apply">적용</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="co-summary">
      <div class="co-sum-row"><span>상품 금액</span><span id="co-sub">0원</span></div>
      <div class="co-sum-row"><span>배송비</span><span>무료</span></div>
      <div class="co-sum-row"><span>쿠폰 할인</span><span>-0원</span></div>
      <div class="co-sum-total"><span>최종 결제 금액</span><span id="co-total">0원</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="co-section">
      <div class="co-label">결제 수단</div>
      <div class="co-row">
        <input class="co-input" placeholder="카드 번호">
        <input class="co-input" placeholder="유효기간 MM/YY">
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="co-pay">결제하기</button>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- 제품 상세 팝업 -->
<div id="prod-popup">
  <div id="prod-dim" onclick="closeProd()"></div>
  <div id="prod-box">
    <button class="pb-close" onclick="closeProd()">✕</button>
    <div class="pb-img" id="pb-img">🧼</div>
    <div class="pb-body">
      <div class="pb-tag" id="pb-tag">BATH & CARE</div>
      <div class="pb-name" id="pb-name">고체 샴푸바</div>
      <div class="pb-price" id="pb-price">18,000원</div>
      <div class="pb-desc" id="pb-desc">설명</div>
      <div class="pb-feats" id="pb-feats"></div>
      <div class="pb-actions">
        <button class="pb-cart" onclick="addFromProd()">장바구니 담기</button>
        <button class="pb-buy" onclick="addFromProd(); closeProd(); openCheckout();">바로 구매</button>
        <button class="pb-inquiry">문의하기</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 결제 팝업 -->
<div id="checkout-popup">
  <div id="checkout-dim" onclick="closeCheckout()"></div>
  <div id="checkout-box">
    <button class="co-close" onclick="closeCheckout()">✕</button>
    <div class="co-title">결제</div>
    <div class="co-section">
      <div class="co-label">받는 분</div>
      <input class="co-input" placeholder="이름">
      <input class="co-input" placeholder="연락처">
    </div>
    <div class="co-section">
      <div class="co-label">배송지</div>
      <input class="co-input" placeholder="주소">
      <input class="co-input" placeholder="상세 주소">
    </div>
    <div class="co-section">
      <div class="co-label">쿠폰</div>
      <div class="co-coupon">
        <input class="co-input" placeholder="쿠폰 코드 입력">
        <button class="co-apply">적용</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="co-summary">
      <div class="co-sum-row"><span>상품 금액</span><span id="co-sub">0원</span></div>
      <div class="co-sum-row"><span>배송비</span><span>무료</span></div>
      <div class="co-sum-row"><span>쿠폰 할인</span><span>-0원</span></div>
      <div class="co-sum-total"><span>최종 결제 금액</span><span id="co-total">0원</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="co-section">
      <div class="co-label">결제 수단</div>
      <div class="co-row">
        <input class="co-input" placeholder="카드 번호">
        <input class="co-input" placeholder="MM/YY">
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="co-pay">결제하기</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 브랜드 페이지 -->
<div id="pb" class="page">
  <div id="pbfog"></div>
  <button class="page-back" onclick="goHome()" title="뒤로 (ESC)">←</button>
  <button class="game-pill" onclick="openGame()">
    <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><rect x="1" y="5" width="14" height="9" rx="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><rect x="3" y="8" width="3" height="1" rx=".5" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="4" y="7" width="1" height="3" rx=".5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="11" cy="8.5" r="1" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="13" cy="10.5" r="1" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
    게임하기
  </button>
  <div class="bh">
    <div style="width:60px;"></div>
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," onclick="goHome()" class="hl" onmouseover="this.style.filter='drop-shadow(0 4px 18px rgba(63,191,239,.7))'" onmouseout="this.style.filter='drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(63,191,239,.3))'">
    <div class="ht">BRAND STORY</div>
  </div>
  <div id="bs">
    <div class="bc">
      <div class="bsc"><div class="sl">✦ 01 — OFFLINE STORE</div><div class="sh"><div class="shp"><div class="shpt">오프라인 매장 이미지 (준비중)</div></div><div class="sib"><div class="sn2">일상을 비우고, 바다를 채우는 공간</div><div class="sa">부산의 푸른 바다를 닮은 무해의 오프라인 공간</div><div class="sbdy prox">버려진 것들에 새로운 숨결을 불어넣은 업사이클링 가구들, 은은한 자연의 향, 그리고 플라스틱 없이 채워진 정갈한 제품들까지.</div><div class="stgs"><span class="stg">업사이클링 가구</span><span class="stg">리필 스테이션</span><span class="stg">플라스틱 프리</span></div></div></div></div>
      <div class="bsc"><div class="sl">✦ 02 — THE BEGINNING</div><div class="sg"><div class="sc"><div class="cn">001</div><div class="ch">파도가 전해온<br>이야기에서 시작되었습니다</div><div class="cb prox">늘 우리 곁에서 넘실거리며 위로를 주던 푸른 바다. 어느 날 문득 마주한 바다는 우리가 무심코 흘려보낸 일상의 흔적들로 신음하고 있었습니다.</div></div><div class="sc"><div class="cn">002</div><div class="ch">"우리의 일상이<br>자연에게 상처가 되지 않을 수는 없을까?"</div><div class="cb prox">무해는 이 본질적인 질문에서 출발했습니다. 바다를 지키는 일은 오늘 내가 사용하는 작은 물건 하나를 바꾸는 것에서 시작됩니다.</div></div></div></div>
      <div class="bsc"><div class="sl">✦ 03 — THE NAME</div><div class="lm"><div class="lb">MUHE</div><div class="lk">무해 · 霧海 · 無害</div><div class="mr"><div><div class="mh">無害</div><div class="mk">무해 (無害)</div><div class="md">자연과 인간에게 해가 없다</div></div><div class="mdv"></div><div><div class="mh">霧海</div><div class="mk">무해 (霧海)</div><div class="md">안개로 뒤덮인 신비로운 바다</div></div></div><div class="ld prox">두 가지 뜻을 가진 이름, 무해. 무해(無害)함이 일상이 되는 그날까지.</div></div></div>
      <div class="bsc"><div class="sl">✦ 04 — OUR VALUES</div><div class="pt"><div class="vc"><div class="vt">Less Plastic,<br>More Ocean</div><div class="vd prox">플라스틱은 적게, 바다는 넓게. 불필요한 일회용 플라스틱을 걷어내고 자연 순환이 가능한 친환경 소재만을 엄선합니다.</div></div><div class="vc"><div class="vt">Slow &<br>Sustainable Life</div><div class="vd prox">빠르게 소비되고 쉽게 버려지는 문화 대신, 하나의 물건을 오래도록 소중히 사용하는 슬로우 라이프를 지향합니다.</div></div><div class="vc"><div class="vt">Logical<br>Solution</div><div class="vd prox">환경 문제를 해결하는 논리적이고 실천적인 디자인으로 제로웨이스트를 더 매력적으로 만듭니다.</div></div><div class="vc"><div class="vt">Local &<br>Community</div><div class="vd prox">부산에서 시작해 해안 도시로 이어지는 네트워크. 지역 사회와 상생하며 해양 생태계 보호 메시지를 전달합니다.</div></div></div></div>
      <div class="bsc"><div class="sl">✦ 05 — SUSTAINABILITY</div><div class="sw"><div class="swt">우리의 모든 걸음은<br>자연을 향합니다</div><div class="sws">SUSTAINABILITY · 지속가능성</div><div class="swg"><div class="swi"><div class="swk">Zero</div><div class="swu">WASTE SYSTEM</div><div class="swl prox">포장재를 최소화하고 재사용 가능한 패키지만을 사용합니다</div></div><div class="swi"><div class="swk">Up</div><div class="swu">CYCLING ACTION</div><div class="swl prox">버려지는 자원에 새로운 가치를 더하는 업사이클링을 실천합니다</div></div><div class="swi"><div class="swk">Local</div><div class="swu">ECO-FRIENDLY</div><div class="swl prox">지역 사회와 상생하며 해양 생태계 보호 메시지를 전달합니다</div></div></div><div class="swc">지구에게도, 당신에게도 해롭지 않은 선택.<br><em>무해와 함께 지속 가능한 내일을 만들어가세요.</em></div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="schi" id="shi"><div class="schl"></div><div class="scht">SCROLL</div></div>
</div>

<!-- 제품 페이지 -->
<div id="pp" class="page">
  <button class="page-back" onclick="goHome()" title="뒤로 (ESC)">←</button>
  <button class="game-pill" onclick="openGame()">
    <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><rect x="1" y="5" width="14" height="9" rx="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><rect x="3" y="8" width="3" height="1" rx=".5" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="4" y="7" width="1" height="3" rx=".5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="11" cy="8.5" r="1" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="13" cy="10.5" r="1" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
    게임하기
  </button>
  <div class="ph">
    <div style="width:60px;"></div>
    <div onclick="goShopHome()" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;cursor:pointer;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="hl" style="height:52px;">
      <span style="font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.25em;color:rgba(30,100,160,.45);">홈으로</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ptl">PRODUCTS</div>
  </div>
  <div class="fb">
    <button class="ft active" data-cat="all">전체</button>
    <button class="ft" data-cat="bath">욕실</button>
    <button class="ft" data-cat="kitchen">주방</button>
    <button class="ft" data-cat="life">일상 굿즈</button>
  </div>

  <div id="prod-scroll">
    <!-- 베스트 갤러리 -->
    <div id="best-section">
      <div class="best-lbl">✦ BEST ITEMS</div>
      <div id="gcanvas"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- 구분선 -->
    <div style="padding:28px 40px 0;">
      <div class="prod-sep">
        <div class="prod-sep-line"></div>
        <div class="prod-sep-txt">ALL ITEMS</div>
        <div class="prod-sep-line"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 전체 그리드 -->
    <div class="all-grid" id="all-grid"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- 장바구니 hover 팝업 -->
  <div id="cart-hover"
    onmouseenter="clearTimeout(cartHoverTimer)"
    onmouseleave="hideCartHover()">
    <div class="ch-title">장바구니</div>
    <div id="ch-items"><div class="ch-empty">아직 담긴 상품이 없어요</div></div>
    <div class="ch-total" id="ch-total" style="display:none;">
      <span class="ch-total-label">합계</span>
      <span class="ch-total-price" id="ch-total-price">0원</span>
    </div>
    <button class="ch-checkout" onclick="openCheckout()">결제하기</button>
  </div>
  <div id="cb"
    onmouseenter="showCartHover()"
    onmouseleave="hideCartHover()">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" width="22" height="22">
      <path d="M6 2L3 6v14a2 2 0 002 2h14a2 2 0 002-2V6l-3-4zM3 6h18M16 10a4 4 0 01-8 0"/>
    </svg>
    <div id="cbc">0</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 로그인 팝업 -->
<div id="lpop">
  <div class="lpm">
    <button class="lpm-close" onclick="closeLpop()">✕</button>
    <div class="lpm-logo">MUHE</div>
    <div class="lpm-sub">무해와 함께하는 제로웨이스트 라이프</div>
    <div class="lpm-tabs">
      <button class="lpm-tab active" id="ltab1" onclick="switchLtab('login')">로그인</button>
      <button class="lpm-tab" id="ltab2" onclick="switchLtab('signup')">회원가입</button>
    </div>
    <div id="lform-login" class="lpm-fields">
      <input class="lpm-input" type="email" id="lemail" placeholder="이메일" />
      <input class="lpm-input" type="password" id="lpw" placeholder="비밀번호" />
      <div class="lpm-hint">테스트 계정: user@muhe.kr / 1234</div>
      <div class="lpm-err" id="lerr">이메일 또는 비밀번호가 올바르지 않습니다.</div>
      <button class="lpm-submit" onclick="doLogin()">로그인</button>
      <div class="lpm-div"><div class="lpm-dl"></div><span class="lpm-dt">또는 소셜 로그인</span><div class="lpm-dl"></div></div>
      <div class="lpm-socials">
        <button class="lpm-social lpm-kakao" onclick="socialLogin('카카오','kakao@muhe.kr')">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 3C6.48 3 2 6.48 2 10.8c0 2.7 1.6 5.07 4 6.48l-1 3.72 4.32-2.88c.88.18 1.77.28 2.68.28 5.52 0 10-3.48 10-7.8S17.52 3 12 3z"/></svg>
          카카오
        </button>
        <button class="lpm-social lpm-naver" onclick="socialLogin('네이버 유저','naver@muhe.kr')">
          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M16.273 12.845L7.376 0H0v24h7.727V11.155L16.624 24H24V0h-7.727z"/></svg>
          네이버
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="lform-signup" class="lpm-fields" style="display:none;">
      <input class="lpm-input" type="text" id="sname" placeholder="이름" />
      <input class="lpm-input" type="email" id="semail" placeholder="이메일" />
      <input class="lpm-input" type="password" id="spw" placeholder="비밀번호" />
      <input class="lpm-input" type="password" id="spw2" placeholder="비밀번호 확인" />
      <div class="lpm-err" id="serr">비밀번호가 일치하지 않습니다.</div>
      <button class="lpm-submit" onclick="doSignup()">회원가입</button>
      <div class="lpm-div"><div class="lpm-dl"></div><span class="lpm-dt">또는 소셜로 시작하기</span><div class="lpm-dl"></div></div>
      <div class="lpm-socials">
        <button class="lpm-social lpm-kakao" onclick="socialLogin('카카오','kakao@muhe.kr')">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 3C6.48 3 2 6.48 2 10.8c0 2.7 1.6 5.07 4 6.48l-1 3.72 4.32-2.88c.88.18 1.77.28 2.68.28 5.52 0 10-3.48 10-7.8S17.52 3 12 3z"/></svg>
          카카오
        </button>
        <button class="lpm-social lpm-naver" onclick="socialLogin('네이버 유저','naver@muhe.kr')">
          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M16.273 12.845L7.376 0H0v24h7.727V11.155L16.624 24H24V0h-7.727z"/></svg>
          네이버
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 마이페이지 -->
<div id="pm" class="page">
  <div id="pmf"></div>
  <div class="bh" style="z-index:10;">
    <button class="game-pill" style="position:relative;top:auto;left:auto;" onclick="openGame()">
      <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><rect x="1" y="5" width="14" height="9" rx="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><rect x="3" y="8" width="3" height="1" rx=".5" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="4" y="7" width="1" height="3" rx=".5" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="11" cy="8.5" r="1" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="13" cy="10.5" r="1" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
      게임하기
    </button>
    <button style="background:none;border:none;cursor:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:0;" onclick="goShopHome()">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," onclick="goHome()" class="hl" onmouseover="this.style.filter='drop-shadow(0 4px 18px rgba(63,191,239,.7))'" onmouseout="this.style.filter='drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(63,191,239,.3))'">
      <div class="ht" style="font-size:20px;letter-spacing:3px;">MUHE</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--bd);opacity:.6;letter-spacing:.1em;">홈으로</div>
    </button>
    <div style="width:60px;"></div>
  </div>
  <div id="ms"><div class="mc">

    <!-- 프로필 카드 -->
    <div class="lc">
      <div class="la" id="uav">🌊</div>
      <div class="li">
        <div class="ln" id="un">로그인이 필요합니다</div>
        <div class="le" id="ue">무해와 함께 제로웨이스트 라이프를 시작해보세요</div>
      </div>
      <button class="lb2" id="lbtn" onclick="handleAuthBtn()">로그인</button>
    </div>

    <!-- 탭 (순서 변경: 주문내역 → 관심상품 → 쿠폰함) -->
    <div class="mt">
      <button class="tb active" onclick="switchTab('or',this)">주문내역</button>
      <button class="tb" onclick="switchTab('wi',this)">관심상품</button>
      <button class="tb" onclick="switchTab('cu',this)">쿠폰함</button>
    </div>

    <!-- 주문내역 탭 -->
    <div class="tc active" id="tc-or">
      <div class="ol">
        <div class="oc">
          <div class="ooh"><div class="oon">MUHE-20260608-003</div><div class="oos pre">배송준비중</div></div>
          <div class="ooi"><div><div class="oon2">고체 치약 민트향 60g</div><div class="oop">12,000원 · 1개</div></div></div>
          <div class="ood">2026.06.08 주문</div>
        </div>
        <div class="oc">
          <div class="ooh"><div class="oon">MUHE-20260602-002</div><div class="oos pre" style="background:rgba(255,180,60,.13);color:#b87000;">배송중</div></div>
          <div class="ooi"><div><div class="oon2">대나무 칫솔 3개입</div><div class="oop">8,900원 · 1개</div></div></div>
          <div class="ood">2026.06.02 주문</div>
        </div>
        <div class="oc">
          <div class="ooh"><div class="oon">MUHE-20260520-001</div><div class="oos del">배송완료</div></div>
          <div class="ooi"><div><div class="oon2">무해 리필 샴푸 200ml</div><div class="oop">14,500원 · 1개</div></div></div>
          <div class="ood">2026.05.20 주문</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 관심상품 탭 -->
    <div class="tc" id="tc-wi">
      <div class="wg">
        <div class="wc" id="wc1">
          <div class="wi2">🧼</div>
          <div class="wif"><div class="wn">고체 샴푸바</div><div class="wp">18,000원</div></div>
          <button class="wd" onclick="rmWish('wc1')">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="wc" id="wc2">
          <div class="wi2">🪥</div>
          <div class="wif"><div class="wn">대나무 칫솔</div><div class="wp">6,500원</div></div>
          <button class="wd" onclick="rmWish('wc2')">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="wc" id="wc3">
          <div class="wi2">🫧</div>
          <div class="wif"><div class="wn">무해 리필 바디워시</div><div class="wp">16,000원</div></div>
          <button class="wd" onclick="rmWish('wc3')">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="wc" id="wc4">
          <div class="wi2">🌿</div>
          <div class="wif"><div class="wn">밀랍 랩 3종 세트</div><div class="wp">13,000원</div></div>
          <button class="wd" onclick="rmWish('wc4')">✕</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 쿠폰함 탭 -->
    <div class="tc" id="tc-cu">
      <div class="cug">
        <div class="cuc">
          <div class="cub">GAME</div>
          <div class="cud">10%</div>
          <div class="cun">안개섬 첫 정화 기념 쿠폰</div>
          <div class="cude">무해 전 제품 10% 할인</div>
          <div class="cue">유효기간 · 2026.09.01까지</div>
        </div>
        <div class="cuc">
          <div class="cub">GAME</div>
          <div class="cud">500원</div>
          <div class="cun">바다 정화 보상 쿠폰</div>
          <div class="cude">다음 주문 시 500원 할인</div>
          <div class="cue">유효기간 · 2026.08.15까지</div>
        </div>
        <div class="cuc">
          <div class="cub" style="background:rgba(200,200,200,.15);color:#aaa;">WELCOME</div>
          <div class="cud">3,000원</div>
          <div class="cun">첫 구매 환영 쿠폰</div>
          <div class="cude">10,000원 이상 구매 시 사용 가능</div>
          <div class="cue">유효기간 · 2026.12.31까지</div>
        </div>
        <div class="cuc" style="opacity:.4;">
          <div class="cub" style="background:rgba(200,200,200,.15);color:#aaa;">EVENT</div>
          <div style="position:absolute;top:12px;right:40px;font-size:8px;color:#aaa;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;padding:1px 6px;">사용완료</div>
          <div class="cud" style="color:#ccc;">5%</div>
          <div class="cun">봄맞이 할인 쿠폰</div>
          <div class="cude">전 제품 5% 할인</div>
          <div class="cue">유효기간 만료</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div></div>
</div>


<!-- 게임 팝업 페이지 (iframe) -->
<div id="pgame" class="page" style="background:#071828;overflow:hidden;">
  <button class="page-back" onclick="closeGame()" title="게임 닫기 (ESC)" style="z-index:200;background:rgba(7,24,40,0.9);color:#5BC8E8;border-color:rgba(91,200,232,0.4);">←</button>
  <button class="home-pill-tr" onclick="goShopHome()" title="홈페이지로">
    <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M8 2L2 7h2v6h3V10h2v3h3V7h2L8 2z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
    홈페이지
  </button>
  <iframe id="game-iframe" src="" style="width:100%;height:100%;border:none;display:block;" title="MUHE ISLAND Game"></iframe>
</div>

<script>
// 커서
const cur = document.getElementById('cur');
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { cur.style.left=e.clientX+'px'; cur.style.top=e.clientY+'px'; });
document.addEventListener('mousedown', () => cur.style.transform='translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.8)');
document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => cur.style.transform='translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)');

// 팝업
function openPop() {
  document.getElementById('fv').classList.remove('on');
  document.getElementById('fvg').classList.remove('on');
  document.getElementById('fvh').classList.remove('on');
  document.getElementById('ftgl2').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('fhgtgl').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('pop').classList.add('open');
  // 카운트업
  setTimeout(() => {
    cuFloat('sw', 12.4, 1800);
    cuInt('sr', 87, 1600);
    cuInt('su2', 3240, 2000);
  }, 150);
}
function closePop() { document.getElementById('pop').classList.remove('open'); }

function cuInt(id, target, dur) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!el) return;
  let cur2 = 0;
  const step = target / (dur / 16);
  const t = setInterval(() => {
    cur2 += step;
    if (cur2 >= target) { cur2 = target; clearInterval(t); }
    el.textContent = Math.floor(cur2).toLocaleString();
  }, 16);
}
function cuFloat(id, target, dur) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!el) return;
  let cur2 = 0;
  const step = target / (dur / 16);
  const t = setInterval(() => {
    cur2 += step;
    if (cur2 >= target) { cur2 = target; clearInterval(t); }
    el.textContent = cur2.toFixed(1);
  }, 16);
}

// 모드 선택
function selMode(mode) {
  const fv = document.getElementById('fv');
  const fvg = document.getElementById('fvg');
  const fvh = document.getElementById('fvh');
  const ftgl = document.getElementById('ftgl2');
  const fhgtgl = document.getElementById('fhgtgl');
  fv.classList.add('on');
  if (mode === 'game') {
    closePop();
    openGame();
    return;
  } else {
    fvh.classList.add('on');
    fvg.classList.remove('on');
    ftgl.style.display = 'block';
    ftgl.innerHTML = '<button class="tpill" onclick="selMode(&apos;game&apos;)">' +
      '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><rect x="1" y="5" width="14" height="9" rx="3" stroke="#1a5a7a" stroke-width="1.2"/><rect x="3" y="8" width="3" height="1" rx=".5" fill="#1a5a7a"/><rect x="4" y="7" width="1" height="3" rx=".5" fill="#1a5a7a"/><circle cx="11" cy="8.5" r="1" fill="#1a5a7a"/><circle cx="13" cy="10.5" r="1" fill="#1a5a7a"/></svg>' +
      '게임</button>';
    fhgtgl.style.display = 'block';
    // 로딩
    const ld = document.getElementById('fhload');
    ld.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:20;background:rgba(180,220,245,.95);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;';
    ld.querySelector('.fhlfill').style.width = '0';
    ld.querySelector('.fhlfill').style.animation = 'none';
    void ld.offsetWidth;
    ld.querySelector('.fhlfill').style.animation = 'lf 1.5s ease forwards';
    setTimeout(() => {
      ld.style.opacity = '0';
      ld.style.transition = 'opacity .6s';
      setTimeout(() => ld.style.display='none', 700);
    }, 1800);
    makeSparkles();
  }
}

// 로고 안개
// 네비게이션 히스토리 (ESC 뒤로가기용)
const navHistory = [];

// ESC = 뒤로가기
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key !== 'Escape') return;
  e.preventDefault();

  // 제품 상세 팝업이 열려 있으면 닫기
  const prodPopup = document.querySelector('#prod-popup.open, #checkout-popup.open, #cpop.open');
  if (prodPopup) { prodPopup.classList.remove('open'); return; }

  // 페이지가 활성화되어 있으면 팝업으로 돌아가기
  const activePage = document.querySelector('.page.active');
