  if (activePage) {
    if (activePage.id === 'pgame') { closeGame(); }
    else { goHome(); }
    return;
  }

  // 팝업 내부 세부 뷰(fv)가 열려 있으면 선택 화면으로
  const fv = document.getElementById('fv');
  if (fv && fv.classList.contains('on')) {
    fv.classList.remove('on');
    document.getElementById('ftgl2').style.display = 'none';
    return;
  }

  // 팝업이 열려 있으면 닫기
  const pop = document.getElementById('pop');
  if (pop && pop.classList.contains('open')) { closePop(); return; }
});

function initFogCanvas() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('fogCanvas');
  if (!canvas) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  let w, h;

  function resize() {
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    w = canvas.width = rect.width;
    h = canvas.height = rect.height;
  }
  resize();
  window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

  const blobs = Array.from({length: 8}, () => ({
    x: 0.05 + Math.random() * 0.9,
    y: 0.05 + Math.random() * 0.9,
    rx: 0.28 + Math.random() * 0.32,
    ry: 0.18 + Math.random() * 0.22,
    dx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.00012,
    dy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.00007,
    op: 0.32 + Math.random() * 0.22,
    ph: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
  }));

  let fogPhase = 'idle';
  let clearX = 0.5, clearY = 0.5;
  let clearRadius = 0, maxR = 0;
  let phaseStart = 0;
  const DUR_CLEAR = 2000, DUR_SHOW = 2800, DUR_REFILL = 3500;

  function drawFog(t) {
    blobs.forEach(b => {
      b.x = (b.x + b.dx + 1) % 1;
      b.y = (b.y + b.dy + 1) % 1;
      const cx = b.x * w, cy = b.y * h;
      const rx = b.rx * w, ry = b.ry * h;
      const r = Math.max(rx, ry);
      const pulse = 0.88 + 0.12 * Math.sin(t * 0.00025 + b.ph);
      const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, r);
      grad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(218,239,253,${b.op * pulse})`);
      grad.addColorStop(0.55, `rgba(205,230,250,${b.op * pulse * 0.55})`);
      grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(195,224,248,0)');
      ctx.save();
      ctx.transform(1, 0, 0, ry / rx, 0, cy * (1 - ry / rx));
      ctx.fillStyle = grad;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(cx, cy, rx, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.restore();
    });
  }

  function punchHole(cx, cy, r) {
    if (r <= 2) return;
    const soft = r * 0.22;
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'destination-out';
    const g = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, Math.max(0, r - soft), cx, cy, r);
    g.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0,0,0,1)');
    g.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
    ctx.fillStyle = g;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx, cy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function onCleared() {
    const hint = document.getElementById('fhhint');
    if (hint) { hint.style.transition = 'opacity 0.8s'; hint.style.opacity = '0'; }
    const fvh = document.getElementById('fvh');
    if (fvh) { fvh.classList.add('fog-cleared'); fvh.classList.remove('fog-on'); }
    document.querySelectorAll('.ffy').forEach((el, i) => {
      el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.5s ease ' + (i*0.15) + 's, transform 0.5s ease ' + (i*0.15) + 's';
      el.style.opacity = '0'; el.style.transform = 'translateY(14px)';
      setTimeout(() => { el.style.opacity = '1'; el.style.transform = ''; }, 80 + i * 160);
    });
  }

  function onRestored() {
    const hint = document.getElementById('fhhint');
    if (hint) { hint.style.transition = 'opacity 1.5s'; hint.style.opacity = '1'; }
    const fvh = document.getElementById('fvh');
    if (fvh) { fvh.classList.remove('fog-cleared'); fvh.classList.add('fog-on'); }
  }

  let showTimer = null;
  function animate(t) {
    if (canvas.offsetWidth > 0 && canvas.width === 0) resize();
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);
    const cx = clearX * w, cy = clearY * h;

    if (fogPhase === 'idle') {
      drawFog(t);

    } else if (fogPhase === 'clearing') {
      const p = Math.min(1, (t - phaseStart) / DUR_CLEAR);
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 2.8);
      clearRadius = eased * maxR;
      drawFog(t);
      punchHole(cx, cy, clearRadius);
      if (p >= 1) {
        fogPhase = 'showing';
        onCleared();
        showTimer = setTimeout(() => { fogPhase = 'refilling'; phaseStart = performance.now(); }, DUR_SHOW);
      }

    } else if (fogPhase === 'showing') {
      drawFog(t);
      punchHole(cx, cy, maxR);

    } else if (fogPhase === 'refilling') {
      const p = Math.min(1, (t - phaseStart) / DUR_REFILL);
      const eased = p * p;
      clearRadius = maxR * (1 - eased);
      drawFog(t);
      if (clearRadius > 1) punchHole(cx, cy, clearRadius);
      if (p >= 1) {
        fogPhase = 'idle';
        clearRadius = 0;
        onRestored();
      }
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  }

  canvas.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    if (fogPhase !== 'idle') return;
    if (showTimer) clearTimeout(showTimer);
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    clearX = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width;
    clearY = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height;
    maxR = Math.sqrt(w * w + h * h);
    clearRadius = 0;
    fogPhase = 'clearing';
    phaseStart = performance.now();
  });

  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// 외부 페이지 이동
const fogt = document.getElementById('fogt');
function goPage(page) {
  fogt.classList.add('in');
  navHistory.push('page');
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById('p'+page[0]).classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('page-dim').classList.add('on');
    if (page === 'products') document.getElementById('cb').classList.add('visible');
    if (page === 'brand') initBrand();
    setTimeout(() => fogt.classList.remove('in'), 100);
  }, 450);
}
function goHome() {
  fogt.classList.add('in');
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById('cb').classList.remove('visible');
    document.getElementById('page-dim').classList.remove('on');
    const gf = document.getElementById('game-iframe');
    if (gf) gf.src = '';
    openPop();
    setTimeout(() => fogt.classList.remove('in'), 100);
  }, 450);
}

// 샵 홈 화면으로 바로 이동 (로고 클릭 시)
function goShopHome() {
  fogt.classList.add('in');
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById('cb').classList.remove('visible');
    document.getElementById('page-dim').classList.remove('on');
    const gf = document.getElementById('game-iframe');
    if (gf) gf.src = '';
    document.getElementById('pop').classList.add('open');
    selMode('home');
    setTimeout(() => fogt.classList.remove('in'), 100);
  }, 450);
}

// 게임 iframe 열기
function openGame() {
  fogt.classList.add('in');
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
    const gameDiv = document.getElementById('pgame');
    const iframe = document.getElementById('game-iframe');
    if (gameDiv && iframe) {
      closePop(); // 팝업 배경 노출 방지
      if (!iframe.src || !iframe.src.includes('muhe_game.html')) {
        iframe.src = 'muhe_game.html';
      }
      gameDiv.classList.add('active');
      document.getElementById('page-dim').classList.add('on');
      // 커서 충돌 방지
      cur.style.display = 'none';
      document.body.style.cursor = 'default';
    }
    setTimeout(() => fogt.classList.remove('in'), 100);
  }, 450);
}

// 게임 닫기
function closeGame() {
  fogt.classList.add('in');
  setTimeout(() => {
    const gameDiv = document.getElementById('pgame');
    if (gameDiv) gameDiv.classList.remove('active');
    document.getElementById('page-dim').classList.remove('on');
    const gf = document.getElementById('game-iframe');
    if (gf) gf.src = '';
    // 커서 복원
    cur.style.display = '';
    document.body.style.cursor = '';
    openPop();
    setTimeout(() => fogt.classList.remove('in'), 100);
  }, 450);
}

// 게임에서 오는 postMessage 처리
window.addEventListener('message', (e) => {
  if (!e.data || !e.data.action) return;
  if (e.data.action === 'openShop') goPage('products');
  if (e.data.action === 'goShopHome') goShopHome();
  if (e.data.action === 'closeGame') closeGame();
});

// 브랜드 reveal
function initBrand() {
  const scroll = document.getElementById('bs');
  scroll.scrollTop = 0;
  const hint = document.getElementById('shi');
  if (hint) hint.style.opacity = '1';
  scroll.addEventListener('scroll', function oh() {
    if (scroll.scrollTop > 60 && hint) { hint.style.opacity='0'; scroll.removeEventListener('scroll',oh); }
  });
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (!e.isIntersecting) return;
      const s = e.target;
      s.classList.add('visible');
      s.querySelectorAll('.sc').forEach((el,i) => setTimeout(()=>el.classList.add('visible'),i*150));
      s.querySelectorAll('.vc').forEach((el,i) => setTimeout(()=>el.classList.add('visible'),i*120));
      s.querySelectorAll('.swi').forEach((el,i) => setTimeout(()=>el.classList.add('visible'),i*130));
      obs.unobserve(s);
    });
  }, {root:scroll,threshold:.12});
  document.querySelectorAll('.bsc').forEach(s => {
    s.classList.remove('visible');
    s.querySelectorAll('.sc,.vc,.swi').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('visible'));
    obs.observe(s);
  });
  scroll.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.prox').forEach(el => {
      const r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      const d = Math.hypot(e.clientX-(r.left+r.width/2), e.clientY-(r.top+r.height/2));
      el.classList.remove('dim','mid','near');
      if (d<120) el.classList.add('near');
      else if (d<280) el.classList.add('mid');
      else el.classList.add('dim');
    });
  });
  scroll.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => document.querySelectorAll('.prox').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('dim','mid','near')));
}

// 캐러셀 제거됨 (갤러리로 대체)


// ── 제품 데이터
var prodData = {
  shampoo:     { icon:'🧼', name:'고체 샴푸바',      price:'18,000원', num:18000, cat:'bath',    tag:'BATH & CARE',   desc:'종이 밴딩 패키지로 플라스틱 포장을 없앤 고체형 샴푸바. 천연 성분으로 두피와 모발을 부드럽게 케어하며, 일반 샴푸 대비 약 3배 오래 사용 가능합니다.', feats:['플라스틱 제로','천연 성분','비건 인증','종이 밴딩'] },
  brush:       { icon:'🪥', name:'대나무 칫솔',      price:'6,500원',  num:6500,  cat:'bath',    tag:'DENTAL CARE',   desc:'100% 자연 분해되는 대나무 손잡이 칫솔. 사용 후 손잡이는 90일 안에 분해됩니다. 태그 브랜딩으로 선물용으로도 좋습니다.', feats:['자연 분해','대나무 소재','태그 브랜딩'] },
  toothpaste:  { icon:'🫧', name:'고체 치약',        price:'12,000원', num:12000, cat:'bath',    tag:'DENTAL CARE',   desc:'튜브 없는 고체 치약 정제. 하나씩 꺼내 사용하는 간편한 형태로 플라스틱을 줄입니다.', feats:['플라스틱 제로','불소 무함유','비건'] },
  soap_bag:    { icon:'🪢', name:'삼베 비누망',      price:'4,500원',  num:4500,  cat:'bath',    tag:'BATH & CARE',   desc:'천연 삼베로 만든 비누망. 거품을 풍성하게 내주고 비누를 오래 사용할 수 있게 도와줍니다.', feats:['천연 삼베','내구성 우수','자연 분해'] },
  sponge:      { icon:'🧽', name:'천연 수세미',      price:'5,000원',  num:5000,  cat:'kitchen', tag:'KITCHEN',       desc:'루파(loofah) 식물에서 얻은 천연 수세미. 사용 후 퇴비로 활용 가능합니다.', feats:['천연 소재','생분해','항균'] },
  handkerchief:{ icon:'🤿', name:'손수건',           price:'9,000원',  num:9000,  cat:'kitchen', tag:'KITCHEN',       desc:'유기농 면 손수건. 종이 타월을 대체하는 가장 쉬운 제로웨이스트 실천입니다.', feats:['유기농 면','세탁 가능','패브릭 태그'] },
  tumbler:     { icon:'🫗', name:'텀블러',           price:'28,000원', num:28000, cat:'life',    tag:'LIFESTYLE',     desc:'스테인리스 이중 보온 텀블러. 무해 로고 각인 에디션으로 일상 속 플라스틱 컵을 대체합니다.', feats:['스테인리스','보온·보냉','무해 각인'] },
  ecobag:      { icon:'👜', name:'면 에코백',        price:'15,000원', num:15000, cat:'life',    tag:'LIFESTYLE',     desc:'100% 유기농 면으로 제작한 에코백. 무해 타이포그래피 프린팅으로 브랜드 메시지를 일상에 담습니다.', feats:['유기농 면','로고 프린팅','전시 겸용'] },
  memo:        { icon:'📓', name:'재활용지 메모장',  price:'7,000원',  num:7000,  cat:'life',    tag:'LIFESTYLE',     desc:'폐지를 재활용하여 만든 메모패드. 무해 컬러와 타이포그래피를 적용한 브랜드 굿즈입니다.', feats:['재활용지','브랜드 디자인','A5 사이즈'] }
};

var bestIds = ['shampoo','brush','ecobag','tumbler','sponge'];

// 베스트 갤러리 위치 (겹치지 않게)
var giPos = [
  { left:40,   top:50,  w:210, h:240 },
  { left:290,  top:90,  w:180, h:205 },
  { left:510,  top:30,  w:230, h:265 },
  { left:785,  top:75,  w:195, h:220 },
  { left:1025, top:40,  w:175, h:200 }
];

var currentProd = null;
var cartItems = [];
var cartHoverTimer = null;
var galOffX = 0, galDragging = false, galStartX = 0;

function buildGallery() {
  var canvas = document.getElementById('gcanvas');
  if (!canvas) return;
  canvas.innerHTML = '';

  bestIds.forEach(function(id, i) {
    var p = prodData[id];
    var pos = giPos[i];
    if (!p || !pos) return;

    var gi = document.createElement('div');
    gi.className = 'gi';
    gi.style.left = pos.left + 'px';
    gi.style.top  = pos.top  + 'px';
    gi.style.width  = pos.w + 'px';
    gi.style.height = pos.h + 'px';
    gi.style.position = 'absolute';

    // glow
    var glow = document.createElement('div');
    glow.className = 'gi-glow';

    // wrap
    var wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'gi-wrap';
    wrap.style.width  = '100%';
    wrap.style.height = '100%';

    // art
    var art = document.createElement('div');
    art.className = 'gi-art';

    // 기본 라벨 (hover 전)
    var lbl = document.createElement('div');
    lbl.className = 'gi-label';
    lbl.textContent = p.name;

    // 슬라이드 (hover 시 재생)
    var slides = document.createElement('div');
    slides.className = 'gi-slides';
    var bgClasses = ['gi-slide-bg1','gi-slide-bg2','gi-slide-bg3'];
    var texts = [p.icon, p.name, p.price];
    for (var s = 0; s < 3; s++) {
      var slide = document.createElement('div');
      slide.className = 'gi-slide ' + bgClasses[s];
      slide.textContent = texts[s];
      slides.appendChild(slide);
    }

    // CTA 버튼
    var cta = document.createElement('button');
    cta.className = 'gi-cta';
    cta.textContent = '상세 보기';
    (function(pid) {
      cta.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        openProd(pid);
      });
    })(id);

    // 방울
    var bubbles = document.createElement('div');
    bubbles.className = 'gi-bubbles';
    for (var b = 0; b < 7; b++) {
      var dot = document.createElement('div');
      dot.className = 'bdot';
      var sz = 4 + Math.random() * 7;
      dot.style.width  = sz + 'px';
      dot.style.height = sz + 'px';
      dot.style.left   = (8 + Math.random() * 84) + '%';
      dot.style.bottom = (4 + Math.random() * 40) + '%';
      dot.style.animationDuration = (1.3 + Math.random() * 1.5) + 's';
      dot.style.animationDelay    = (Math.random() * 1.4) + 's';
      bubbles.appendChild(dot);
    }

    art.appendChild(slides);
    art.appendChild(lbl);
    art.appendChild(cta);
    wrap.appendChild(art);
    gi.appendChild(glow);
    gi.appendChild(wrap);
    gi.appendChild(bubbles);

    gi.addEventListener('click', function() { openProd(id); });
    canvas.appendChild(gi);
  });
}

function buildGrid(cat) {
  cat = cat || 'all';
  var grid = document.getElementById('all-grid');
  if (!grid) return;
  grid.innerHTML = '';

  Object.keys(prodData).forEach(function(id) {
    var p = prodData[id];
    if (cat !== 'all' && p.cat !== cat) return;
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'agc';
    var bg = document.createElement('div'); bg.className = 'agc-bg';
    var icon = document.createElement('div'); icon.className = 'agc-icon'; icon.textContent = p.icon;
    var name = document.createElement('div'); name.className = 'agc-name'; name.textContent = p.name;
    var price = document.createElement('div'); price.className = 'agc-price'; price.textContent = p.price;
    card.appendChild(bg); card.appendChild(icon); card.appendChild(name); card.appendChild(price);
    card.addEventListener('click', function() { openProd(id); });
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });

  // 준비중 카드
  ['준비중','준비중','준비중'].forEach(function(t) {
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'agc agce';
    var icon = document.createElement('div'); icon.className = 'agc-icon'; icon.textContent = '+';
    var name = document.createElement('div'); name.className = 'agc-name'; name.textContent = t;
    card.appendChild(icon); card.appendChild(name);
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// 갤러리 드래그
function initGalleryDrag() {
  var section = document.getElementById('best-section');
  var canvas  = document.getElementById('gcanvas');
  if (!section || !canvas) return;

  section.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
    if (e.target.classList.contains('gi-cta')) return;
    galDragging = true;
    galStartX = e.clientX;
    section.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
    e.preventDefault();
  });
  document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    if (!galDragging) return;
    var dx = e.clientX - galStartX;
    galStartX = e.clientX;
    var minX = -(1600 - section.clientWidth + 40);
    galOffX = Math.max(minX, Math.min(0, galOffX + dx));
    canvas.style.transform = 'translateX(' + galOffX + 'px)';
  });
  document.addEventListener('mouseup', function() {
    if (!galDragging) return;
    galDragging = false;
    document.getElementById('best-section').style.cursor = '';
  });
}

// 제품 상세
function openProd(id) {
  var p = prodData[id];
  if (!p) return;
  currentProd = id;
  document.getElementById('pb-img').textContent   = p.icon;
  document.getElementById('pb-tag').textContent   = p.tag;
  document.getElementById('pb-name').textContent  = p.name;
  document.getElementById('pb-price').textContent = p.price;
  document.getElementById('pb-desc').textContent  = p.desc;
  var featsEl = document.getElementById('pb-feats');
  featsEl.innerHTML = '';
  p.feats.forEach(function(f) {
    var span = document.createElement('span');
    span.className = 'pb-feat';
    span.textContent = f;
    featsEl.appendChild(span);
  });
  document.getElementById('prod-popup').classList.add('open');
}
function closeProd() { document.getElementById('prod-popup').classList.remove('open'); }
function addFromProd() {
  if (!currentProd) return;
  var p = prodData[currentProd];
  addCart(p.name, p.price, p.num, p.icon);
  closeProd();
}

// 장바구니
function addCart(n, p, pNum, icon) {
  cartItems.push({ n:n, p:p, pNum:pNum, icon:icon||'+' });
  var c = document.getElementById('cbc');
  c.textContent = cartItems.length;
  c.style.display = 'flex';
  updateCartHover();
}
function updateCartHover() {
  var el   = document.getElementById('ch-items');
  var tot  = document.getElementById('ch-total');
  var totP = document.getElementById('ch-total-price');
  if (!el) return;
  if (cartItems.length === 0) {
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="ch-empty">아직 담긴 상품이 없어요</div>';
    if (tot) tot.style.display = 'none';
  } else {
    el.innerHTML = '';
    cartItems.forEach(function(i) {
      var row = document.createElement('div'); row.className = 'ch-item';
      var ico = document.createElement('div'); ico.textContent = i.icon; ico.style.fontSize='20px';
      var info = document.createElement('div');
      var nm = document.createElement('div'); nm.className='ch-name'; nm.textContent=i.n;
      var pr = document.createElement('div'); pr.className='ch-price'; pr.textContent=i.p;
      info.appendChild(nm); info.appendChild(pr);
      row.appendChild(ico); row.appendChild(info);
      el.appendChild(row);
    });
    var total = cartItems.reduce(function(s,i){ return s+(i.pNum||0); }, 0);
    if (totP) totP.textContent = total.toLocaleString()+'원';
    if (tot)  tot.style.display = 'flex';
  }
}
function showCartHover() {
  clearTimeout(cartHoverTimer);
  document.getElementById('cart-hover').classList.add('show');
}
function hideCartHover() {
  cartHoverTimer = setTimeout(function() {
    var el = document.getElementById('cart-hover');
    if (el) el.classList.remove('show');
  }, 300);
}

// 결제
function openCheckout() {
  var el = document.getElementById('cart-hover');
  if (el) el.classList.remove('show');
  var total = cartItems.reduce(function(s,i){ return s+(i.pNum||0); }, 0);
  var coSub = document.getElementById('co-sub');
  var coTot = document.getElementById('co-total');
  if (coSub) coSub.textContent = total.toLocaleString()+'원';
  if (coTot) coTot.textContent = total.toLocaleString()+'원';
  document.getElementById('checkout-popup').classList.add('open');
}
function closeCheckout() { document.getElementById('checkout-popup').classList.remove('open'); }

// 필터 탭
document.querySelectorAll('.ft').forEach(function(t) {
  t.addEventListener('click', function() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.ft').forEach(function(x){ x.classList.remove('active'); });
    t.classList.add('active');
    buildGrid(t.dataset.cat);
  });
});

// 제품 페이지 초기화
function initProductPage() {
  galOffX = 0;
  var canvas = document.getElementById('gcanvas');
  if (canvas) canvas.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
  buildGallery();
  buildGrid('all');
  initGalleryDrag();
}

// 마이페이지 로그인
let loggedIn = false;
const DEMO = { email: 'user@muhe.kr', pw: '1234', name: '무해 탐험가' };

function openLpop() { document.getElementById('lpop').classList.add('open'); }
function closeLpop() { document.getElementById('lpop').classList.remove('open'); }
function switchLtab(t) {
  const isLogin = t === 'login';
  document.getElementById('lform-login').style.display = isLogin ? 'flex' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('lform-signup').style.display = isLogin ? 'none' : 'flex';
  document.getElementById('ltab1').classList.toggle('active', isLogin);
  document.getElementById('ltab2').classList.toggle('active', !isLogin);
}
function setLoggedIn(name, email) {
  loggedIn = true;
  document.getElementById('un').textContent = name;
  document.getElementById('ue').textContent = email;
  document.getElementById('uav').textContent = name.charAt(0) === '무' ? '🌊' : '🧚';
  const b = document.getElementById('lbtn');
  b.textContent = '로그아웃';
  b.className = 'lb2 lo';
  closeLpop();
}
function handleAuthBtn() {
  if (loggedIn) {
    loggedIn = false;
    document.getElementById('un').textContent = '로그인이 필요합니다';
    document.getElementById('ue').textContent = '무해와 함께 제로웨이스트 라이프를 시작해보세요';
    document.getElementById('uav').textContent = '🌊';
    const b = document.getElementById('lbtn');
    b.textContent = '로그인';
    b.className = 'lb2';
  } else {
    openLpop();
  }
}
function doLogin() {
  const email = document.getElementById('lemail').value;
  const pw = document.getElementById('lpw').value;
  const err = document.getElementById('lerr');
  if (email === DEMO.email && pw === DEMO.pw) {
    err.classList.remove('show');
    setLoggedIn(DEMO.name, DEMO.email);
  } else {
    err.classList.add('show');
  }
}
function doSignup() {
  const name = document.getElementById('sname').value || '새 탐험가';
  const email = document.getElementById('semail').value || 'new@muhe.kr';
  const pw = document.getElementById('spw').value;
  const pw2 = document.getElementById('spw2').value;
  const err = document.getElementById('serr');
  if (pw !== pw2) { err.classList.add('show'); return; }
  err.classList.remove('show');
  setLoggedIn(name, email);
}
function socialLogin(name, email) { setLoggedIn(name, email); }
document.getElementById('lpop').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  if (e.target === this) closeLpop();
});

function switchTab(t, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.tc').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tb').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('tc-' + t).classList.add('active');
  btn.classList.add('active');
}
function rmWish(id) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  if (el) {
    el.style.transition = 'transform .3s, opacity .3s';
    el.style.transform = 'scale(.85)';
    el.style.opacity = '0';
    setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 300);
  }
}

// 스파클
function makeSparkles(){
  const h=document.getElementById('fvh');
  h.querySelectorAll('.spkl').forEach(s=>s.remove());
  [[15,38],[48,50],[72,32],[28,25],[85,42],[60,22]].forEach(([l,b],i)=>{
    const s=document.createElement('div');
    s.className='spkl';
    const sz=4+Math.random()*5;
    s.style.cssText=`left:${l}%;bottom:${b}%;width:${sz}px;height:${sz}px;animation-duration:${3+Math.random()*3}s;animation-delay:${i*.7}s`;
    h.appendChild(s);
  });
}

// URL 해시로 페이지 직접 진입 지원 (#products, #brand 등)
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  initFogCanvas();
  const hash = location.hash.replace('#', '');
  if (hash === 'products' || hash === 'brand' || hash === 'mypage') {
    setTimeout(() => goPage(hash), 300);
  } else if (hash === 'game') {
    setTimeout(() => openGame(), 300);
  }
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
